subject: Geography
title: The Berlin Wall
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on The Berlin Wall.

hook.text: In 1961, East Germany built a wall through Berlin overnight to stop people from fleeing.

buildup.text: Families woke up separated. Streets, subway lines, and neighborhoods were cut in two.

discovery.text: Over 100 people died trying to cross the wall during its 28-year existence.

twist.text: On November 9, 1989, a confused press conference led guards to open the gates by mistake.

climax.text: Thousands streamed through. The wall fell not to bombs but to a bureaucratic error.

punchline.text: The wall that divided the world fell by accident.

quiz.question: How did the Berlin Wall ultimately fall?
options: A confused press conference led guards to open the gates
